pages.text:
春天的早上，太阳暖暖的。咘咘和妈妈准备出门啦！

咘咘伸出小手说：“妈妈抱抱～”
pages.text_en:
On a warm spring morning, Bubu and Mommy were getting ready to go out.

Bubu held out her arms. "Mommy, carry me~"

pages.text:
妈妈笑着拍拍小推车说：“咘咘，今天试试坐小车车好不好？

小车车可舒服啦！”
pages.text_en:
Mommy smiled and patted the stroller. "Bubu, how about trying the stroller today?

It's really comfy!"

pages.text:
咘咘坐上了小车车。哇！小脚丫可以晃来晃去，好好玩！

头顶还有一个小遮阳棚，就像自己的小房子。
pages.text_en:
Bubu sat in the stroller. Wow! She could swing her little feet back and forth — so fun!

There was even a little sunshade on top, like her own tiny house.

pages.text:
“小车车好舒服呀！”咘咘开心地踢踢腿。

风吹过来，凉凉的，好舒服～
pages.text_en:
"The stroller is so comfy!" Bubu kicked her legs happily.

The breeze blew by, cool and nice~

pages.text:
坐在小车车里，咘咘看到了好多好多东西！

一只小狗摇着尾巴走过来，汪汪汪！
pages.text_en:
Sitting in the stroller, Bubu could see so many things!

A little dog walked by, wagging its tail. Woof woof woof!

pages.text:
蝴蝶飞过花丛，花朵五颜六色的。

“哇，好漂亮！”咘咘指着蝴蝶说。比在妈妈怀里看得更多更远呢！
pages.text_en:
A butterfly flew past the flowers, all colorful.

"Wow, so pretty!" said Bubu, pointing at the butterfly. She could see even more than from Mommy's arms!

pages.text:
NOMI走过来说：“咘咘，你的车好酷啊！”

NONO在旁边飞来飞去，叽叽喳喳叫。
pages.text_en:
NOMI came over. "Bubu, your ride is so cool!"

NONO flew around nearby, chirping away.

pages.text:
咘咘得意地说：“这是我的探险车！”

她把小兔子玩偶放在车上，一起去探险！
pages.text_en:
Bubu said proudly, "This is my adventure car!"

She put her bunny toy on the stroller to go exploring together!

pages.text:
路过一家小店，好香呀！

妈妈买了一个小蛋糕给咘咘。坐在车里吃，好惬意呀～
pages.text_en:
They passed a little shop — it smelled so good!

Mommy bought a little cake for Bubu. Eating while sitting in the stroller — so nice~

pages.text:
爸爸在后面推着车，妈妈在旁边走。

咘咘一边吃一边看风景，小脚丫晃啊晃，开心极了！
pages.text_en:
Daddy pushed the stroller from behind, Mommy walked alongside.

Bubu munched and watched the scenery, swinging her little feet. So happy!

pages.text:
坐小车车，看大世界。

咘咘今天真棒！
pages.text_en:
Ride the stroller, see the big world.

Bubu did great today!
